diagrams.title: C Program Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows where different storage classes map to in memory
elements: BSS Segment - 未初始化的全局/静态变量
Data Segment - 已初始化的全局/静态变量
CPU Registers - 寄存器变量请求
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where storage class variables reside in memory

diagrams.title: Storage Classes Comparison Chart
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of all four storage classes
elements: AUTO: 作用域-块作用域 | 存储期-自动 | 链接-无 | 初始值-垃圾值
REGISTER: 作用域-块作用域 | 存储期-自动 | 链接-无 | 初始值-垃圾值
STATIC(局部): 作用域-块作用域 | 存储期-静态 | 链接-无 | 初始值-零
STATIC(全局): 作用域-文件作用域 | 存储期-静态 | 链接-内部 | 初始值-零
EXTERN: 作用域-文件作用域 | 存储期-静态 | 链接-外部 | 初始值-零
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for properties of each storage class

diagrams.title: Variable Lifetime Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline showing when variables exist during program execution
elements: Program Start: 静态变量初始化为0
Function Entry: 自动变量创建
Function Exit: 自动变量销毁
Between Calls: 静态变量保留值
Program End: 所有变量销毁
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing storage duration of different storage classes
